headline: T. Rowe Price (TROW): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, T. Rowe Price’s shares (currently trading at $96.69) have posted a disappointing 6.3% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 5.1% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
